title: Amazon India Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Amazon India Advisory Limited is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Amazon India Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer based out of Meerut. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Amazon India Advisory Limited:
Amazon India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India Advisory Limited!
